basic_details.short_information: Odisha Electricity Regulatory Commission (OERC) Ombudsman Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the OERC Ombudsman Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.all_candidates_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 62 years as on 17.06.2026. Appointment for a maximum period of three years or till 65 years of age, whichever is earlier.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 62 years as on 17.06.2026. Appointment for a maximum period of three years or till 65 years of age, whichever is earlier.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of experience in Legal/ Engineering/ Economics / Finance/ Industry/ Civil Service / Consumer Affairs or must be a person of eminence. Must be able to read and write Odia. Experience in the electricity sector preferred. Excellent communication skills.
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of experience in Legal/ Engineering/ Economics / Finance/ Industry/ Civil Service / Consumer Affairs or must be a person of eminence. Must be able to read and write Odia. Experience in the electricity sector shall be preferred. Excellent communication skills.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,00,000/- consolidated remuneration per month. House Rent of Rs.12,000/- per month if accommodation is not provided.
salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration: Rs. 1,00,000/- per month. House Rent Allowance: Rs. 12,000/- per month is payable in case official accommodation is not made available or not availed.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OERC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.odisha_electricity_regulatory_commission: Rs. 1,00,000/- consolidated remuneration per month. House Rent of Rs.12,000/- per month if accommodation is not provided.

Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of experience in Legal/ Engineering/ Economics / Finance/ Industry/ Civil Service / Consumer Affairs or must be a person of eminence. Must be able to read and write Odia. Experience in the electricity sector preferred. Excellent communication skills.
Not more than 62 years as on 17.06.2026. Appointment for a maximum period of three years or till 65 years of age, whichever is earlier.

content_sections.heading: OERC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the OERC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download OERC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OERC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of experience in Legal/ Engineering/ Economics / Finance/ Industry/ Civil Service / Consumer Affairs or must be a person of eminence. Must be able to read and write Odia. Experience in the electricity sector shall be preferred. Excellent communication skills.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: OERC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 62 years as on 17.06.2026. Appointment for a maximum period of three years or till 65 years of age, whichever is earlier.

content_sections.heading: OERC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Consolidated remuneration: Rs. 1,00,000/- per month. House Rent Allowance: Rs. 12,000/- per month is payable in case official accommodation is not made available or not availed.

rows.event: Last date for submission of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for OERC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OERC Ombudsman recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications for the OERC Ombudsman posts is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Ombudsman post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree with at least 25 years of relevant experience in fields like Legal, Engineering, Economics, Finance, Industry, Civil Service, or Consumer Affairs. Proficiency in Odia is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the OERC Ombudsman position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 62 years as of 17th June 2026. The appointment is for a maximum of three years or until the candidate reaches 65 years of age, whichever comes first.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the OERC Ombudsman recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. The duly filled application form along with self-attested copies of testimonials and a photograph should be sent to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Ombudsman post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month. Additionally, a House Rent Allowance of Rs. 12,000/- per month will be provided if official accommodation is not given.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Ombudsman post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Ombudsman post, with one each for Ombudsman-I and Ombudsman-II.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the OERC Ombudsman recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve the shortlisting of eligible applicants followed by an interview. Candidates are advised to prepare thoroughly for both stages.

faq.question: Q9. Does OERC prefer candidates with experience in the electricity sector?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in the electricity sector is preferred for the Ombudsman post. This experience can be a significant advantage during the selection process.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for OERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
